visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women sit at a table in a bright indoor restaurant. The woman on the left wears a black mesh top over a white lace garment, and the woman on the right wears a black top with a choker. They smile enthusiastically at the camera. Large text overlays appear at the top. (2) A brief shot of the restaurant interior reveals workers in yellow shirts moving between white tables and red-accented service areas. (3) The camera focuses back on the two women as they gesture toward two large metal bowls of soup and two smaller bowls of rice on the table. (4) Close-up shots alternate between the women's faces reacting with excitement and the food items. They use spoons to stir and lift ingredients from the bowls. (5) An insert shot shows a close-up of a bowl of braised pork rice topped with generous portions of meat, with a starburst graphic overlay. (6) Another insert shot shows the clear broth of the beef soup being stirred, revealing slices of apple floating within the liquid. (7) The women are shown tasting the food, with the woman on the left taking a large bite of beef and displaying a look of pure satisfaction and surprise. (8) Detailed close-up shots of individual beef slices on a spoon demonstrate the texture and thinness of the meat. (9) The video concludes with both women gesturing towards the food and smiling at the camera, summarizing their experience in the same restaurant setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 台南私藏. [Variety]: 心中第一牛肉湯. [Logo]: @漢漢. (2) [Subtitle]: 我在台南最近很喜歡的旗哥牛肉湯. (3) [Subtitle]: 而且他現在店內有冷氣. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們點了他的500塊特選牛肉湯. (5) [Variety]: 500塊特選牛肉湯. (6) [Subtitle]: 那這500塊特選牛肉他的位置是肩胛肉我們來試試看有沒有好喝. (7) [Subtitle]: 他的肉片比一般的130元還要多2.5倍. (8) [Subtitle]: 那普通牛肉湯大碗的話哎這個肉量還是有差. 你這個多少? 250. (9) [Subtitle]: 先吃便宜的再吃貴的. 那最重要的是他都有附一碗滿滿肉的肉燥飯. (10) [Variety]: 滿滿肉的肉燥飯. (11) [Subtitle]: 牛肉燥飯. 然后他們湯呢會比較甜一點. 因為他們湯裡面都有加一些蘋果. (12) [Subtitle]: 肉超級嫩的我真的很喜歡他們沒什麼筋沒什麼油就嫩嫩QQ的. (13) [Subtitle]: 他的肉好香我真的好喜歡台南的牛吃得到那個牛香香. (14) [Subtitle]: 他的那個他的500元的肉感覺有種牛肉湯裡面的菲力的感覺. (15) [Subtitle]: 好厲害那個油脂好香喔. 超級軟. (16) [Subtitle]: 可是我覺得平價版就超棒的都好吃. (17) [Subtitle]: 但這個肉因為量很多所以也值得. (18) [Subtitle]: 最喜歡就是他的肉片越嚼越香喔那肉真的好好吃喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female main creators, 2 male staff members in yellow, and 1 male customer in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female with short black hair wearing a black mesh top over white lace; one female with long black hair wearing a black top and a black choker.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A spacious, brightly lit traditional beef soup restaurant in Tainan with white tables, black-framed chairs, and staff in yellow uniforms. The interior has large windows letting in natural light.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM with a strong percussive beat starts immediately. A female voice speaks with high energy and a rising pitch contour, introducing a restaurant. (2) A metallic 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of '500 dollars,' accompanied by a slight swell in the music's brightness. (3) A cartoonish 'pop' sound effect triggers as a close-up of food is shown. The female speaker maintains a rapid speech rate with enthusiastic inflections. (4) The BGM transitions slightly to a more rhythmic, meme-style track as they describe the texture of the meat. A subtle splash sound of soup stirring is heard underneath the dialogue. (5) The speaker's arousal levels peak with high-pitched exclamation sounds during the tasting phase. A 'thud' impact SFX occurs during a graphic transition, followed by continued high-energy narration until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a highly enthusiastic and informative review of 'Chige Beef Soup' in Tainan, contrasting a premium version with a standard one and highlighting unique features like the apple-based broth and free rice.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the restaurant name '旗哥牛肉湯' and positive, promotional tone regarding the food quality and value.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The fast editing pace and high-arousal vocal delivery are typical of social media food influencers aiming to maximize engagement.
